_styleSuffix: stylized low-poly, soft golden-hour palette, warm cream + dusty teal accents, isometric 3/4 view, friendly cozy game art, no text, no background

buildings.prompt: A small power station with one cylindrical cooling tower releasing curling soft smoke and a glowing yellow reactor core orb mounted on a brick base
A cozy 3-story apartment block with arched windows, terracotta roof tiles, climbing ivy on the side, balconies with tiny potted plants
A traffic-control tower with stacked observation decks, a striped red and white pole on top, four small traffic-light heads at the base, glowing screens visible inside
A small two-story hospital with a glowing teal cross on the front, a curved bell-shaped white roof, an ambulance silhouette parked at the entrance
A friendly school building with a clock tower, a red flag on top, large arched windows showing chalkboards inside, a small chimney puffing
A neoclassical bank with four short white columns, a triangular pediment, gold coin emblem above the door, marble steps with a small lamp post
An open street market with a striped red and white awning, fruit crates and baskets out front, a chalkboard menu, two paper lanterns hanging
A small city hall building with a copper-domed bell tower, two flagpoles flanking the entrance, ornate stone facade, a clock face on the dome
A research lab with a glass observatory dome on top, satellite dish on the roof, glowing blue beakers visible through tall windows, vent stacks
A news broadcast station with a radio antenna tower on top, a large illuminated sign on the facade, a clock above the door, microphone-shaped roof ornament
